title: eurya tetragonoclada
intro: Eurya tetragonoclada is a species of plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae, commonly known as the mountain hawthorn or white hawthorn. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and alleviating respiratory issues. Eurya tetragonoclada can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
